vulnerability.reference: Resume training data encodes societal gender stereotypes, making gender linearly separable in LLM representations.
vulnerability.generated: Hiring systems inherit societal stereotypes, and opaque feature extraction leaves applicants unable to detect or refute biased evaluations.

impact.reference: Discriminatory hiring outcomes disproportionately exclude women from male-typed roles.
impact.generated: Recruitment decisions systematically discriminate against women, reproducing gendered occupational exclusion.

dose_response.reference: Transformer decoder linearity enables linear probes to extract latent gender-occupation stereotypes, which in resume screening leads to biased evaluations that disproportionately exclude women from male-typed roles.
dose_response.generated: Transformer decoder linearity, through LLM-based resume screening, makes latent gender biases accessible to linear probes, triggering opaque stereotype inheritance that systematically discriminates against women in recruitment.
